crime.value: Mansion robbery disguised as detective services - theft of antiques, jewelry, and valuables from wealthy clients
crime.quote: I went through several other rooms throughout the day, methodically. I opened safe upon safe, dusting for fingerprints

victim.value: The Lawrence family and other wealthy clients who hired Inspector X, made vulnerable by their desperation and paranoia
victim.quote: I have come to the aid of many desperate, paranoid, pathetic fools in the past

closed_world.value: The Lawrence mansion during the family's supposed absence, creating isolated opportunity for the crime
closed_world.quote: Everyone knew that the Lawrence family was diving deep into the clear ocean waves

culprit_and_motive.value: Inspector X (fake detective) motivated by greed - poses as investigator to gain access to wealthy homes for robbery
culprit_and_motive.quote: I also rob the riches right from their hands. You might call me a philanthropist, yes. I believe I am, in a twisted way

resolution.value: Inspector X caught in elaborate police trap set by the Lawrence family, who were actually law enforcement officers
resolution.quote: The Lawrence family consisted of several more intelligent policemen and women who had tracked this so-called Inspector

investigator.value: Inspector X himself - the criminal narrator confessing from prison, providing first-person perspective of the crimes
investigator.quote: This is my written testimonial, to record and confess to the events that took place on the 4th of July

red_herring.value: Inspector persona and ghost/supernatural elements used to mask theft operation
red_herring.quote: I refused to believe that the cause of these strange, spontaneous events was spiritual. I did not believe in ghosts

clue_fairness.value: All clues present in narration - ticking sounds, lack of security, fake inspector identity
clue_fairness.quote: Something was ticking nearby me, and instantly I froze. Wild, unrealistic thoughts began to pop into my crowded mind

social_world.value: Wealthy Lawrence family vs. anonymous criminal exploiting class assumptions about authority
social_world.quote: This was my first multi-millionaire client, and I had to be amused at their lack of security

alibi.value: False Bahamas vacation story and fake inspector credentials as cover for the setup
alibi.quote: Everyone knew that the Lawrence family was diving deep into the clear ocean waves to explore coral reefs

reveal_mechanic.value: Criminal's confession reveals the inspector was the thief and the family were actually police
reveal_mechanic.quote: The Lawrence family consisted of several more intelligent policemen and women who had tracked this so-called Inspector

media_and_audience.value: Criminal's testimonial format and 'X' unknown identity becoming police terminology
media_and_audience.quote: when I had departed with their riches the police referred to me as an 'X' criminal—the 'X' being the unknown identity

investigator_wound.value: Criminal's overconfidence and need for recognition leading to capture
investigator_wound.quote: I will always know, no matter what anyone tells me, that I was one of the most successful, clever criminals

_meta.title: ebook jordan link an inspector 039 s testimonial
